name: metasploitmcp
title: metasploitmcp
description:
MCP Server for Metasploit
A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Metasploit Framework
integration.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use metasploitmcp because MCP Server for Metasploit.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use metasploitmcp as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `metasploitmcp [options] [args]` as documented upstream for metasploitmcp.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair metasploitmcp with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `metasploitmcp --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
